title: PayPal Q3 2022 Preview: Where Next For PayPal Stock
text: PayPal was scheduled to release Q3 2022 earnings on November 3. PayPal was projected to achieve Q3 revenue of $6.8 billion, an increase of 10% year-on-year. Adjusted diluted EPS was expected in the range of 94-96 cents per share. PayPal was down 57% since beginning of the year. Analysts predicted Q3 would see a rise in total operating expenses by 15%. The company faced challenges from macro uncertainty and changing consumer spending patterns post-pandemic.
